title: Need connectivity to templates within document field/column on board
excerpt: Currently, it is not possible to access your own templates within a column document field directly on a board. You can only access them when creating a doc outside of a board. This makes adding notes much less efficient …

posts.author: mweekend (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, it is not possible to access your own templates within a column document field directly on a board. You can only access them when creating a doc outside of a board. This makes adding notes much less efficient as I have to modify the existing templates or start from scratch each time. Please create connectivity to templates.

posts.author: MattFrost (Matt Frost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am not sure I know what you mean here.
When you create a monday doc column you are able to set it so that it creates a document based off of a template.
Do you mean that you want that document to appear in other places?

Happy to help further.

posts.author: mweekend (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml: @MattFrost - I really appreciate your response. I originally set up the word doc and only saw the templates within the doc. I didn’t realize I could see my templates when creating the column in the first place. Many thanks!
